hook: AI gave me a 5-step plan when I just needed someone to think out loud with me.
caption:
AI gave me a 5-step plan when I just needed someone to think out loud with me.

This is the thing nobody talks about.

Some people use AI to GET answers. Some people use it to FIND the question they're actually asking.

If you're the second type, generic AI is almost useless to you.

You write something messy and half-formed. You want it to poke at the edges, ask you what you actually mean, reflect the idea back in a different shape.

Instead you get: "Here are 7 structured steps to achieve your goal."

That's not a thinking partner. That's a slightly faster Google.

The Exploratory Thinker doesn't need more information. They need friction. Good questions. A mirror, not a map.

When your AI profile knows this about you, the whole dynamic changes. It stops closing loops you weren't ready to close.

Your thinking style isn't a preference. It's a fundamental difference in what "helpful" even means to you.

BootFile figures out which of the 8 types you are — and makes sure AI actually shows up for how your brain works.

Stop fighting the format. Change the profile.
